title: Traditional Platforms vs Unchained Commerce for Accepting Payments as a Digital Creator in Pakistan — The Honest Version
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Creators in Nigeria, Pakistan, Ghana, Bangladesh, and dozens of other countries cannot use the platforms everyone else takes for granted. This changes that.

content.text: As a digital creator in Pakistan, you've put your heart and soul into crafting a unique product, only to be met with the frustrating reality of being blocked from collecting payment by traditional platforms like PayPal and Stripe. You're not alone in this struggle, as many creators in Pakistan and other restricted countries face the same geographic restrictions and banking limitations that hinder their ability to sell digital products globally. The question remains, how do you overcome these obstacles and start receiving international payments for your digital products?
What You Are Actually Comparing

When evaluating payment platforms, it's essential to consider the specific needs of digital creators in Pakistan and other restricted countries. You're not just comparing features and fees; you're comparing the ability to access global markets and reach customers worldwide. Traditional platforms like Gumroad and Payhip may seem appealing, but their limitations and restrictions can be devastating for creators who rely on international sales to make a living.
Where the Traditional Platforms Break Down

Traditional platforms like PayPal, Stripe, and Payhip often break down when it comes to supporting creators in restricted countries. Their KYC requirements, geographic restrictions, and limited payment options can make it impossible for creators to receive international payments. Even if you manage to set up an account, you may still face issues with payment verification, delivery, and customer support, ultimately leading to a poor customer experience and lost sales.
What Crypto-Native Infrastructure Does Differently

Crypto-native infrastructure, on the other hand, offers a game-changing alternative for digital creators in Pakistan and other restricted countries. By leveraging blockchain technology and cryptocurrencies, platforms like Unchained Commerce provide a secure, decentralized, and borderless way to accept payments and deliver digital products. With no KYC requirements, instant automated delivery, and support for over 300 coins, crypto-native infrastructure empowers creators to reach a global audience and monetize their digital products without restrictions.
Traditional payment platforms are not designed to support digital creators in restricted countries, resulting in lost sales and revenue.
The Real Cost Difference

While traditional platforms may seem cheaper upfront, their limitations and restrictions can result in significant lost sales and revenue. In contrast, crypto-native infrastructure may require a one-time investment in setup and integration, but it offers a long-term solution that can increase sales, reduce fees, and provide a better customer experience. By choosing a platform like Unchained Commerce, creators can enjoy lifetime access to their store and priority updates, without being locked into expensive subscriptions or contracts.
Which One to Use and Why

For digital creators in Pakistan and other restricted countries, the choice is clear: crypto-native infrastructure offers a more reliable, secure, and borderless way to accept payments and deliver digital products. By using a platform like Unchained Commerce, creators can focus on what they do best – crafting unique and valuable digital products – while enjoying the freedom to sell globally without restrictions. With the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, creators have everything they need to launch a successful digital product store and start receiving international payments.
What Creators in Restricted Countries Are Asking

As a digital creator in Pakistan, you can sell digital products globally without geographic restrictions by leveraging crypto-native infrastructure. This allows you to reach a global audience, accept international payments, and deliver digital products instantly, without being restricted by traditional platforms. Whether you're selling ebooks, courses, or software, crypto-native infrastructure provides a secure and decentralized way to monetize your digital products and grow your business. By using a platform like Unchained Commerce, you can enjoy the freedom to sell globally, without being locked into expensive subscriptions or contracts.
Crypto-native infrastructure provides a secure and decentralized way to accept payments and deliver digital products, without being restricted by traditional platforms.
Related Topics Worth Reading

For creators in Africa and other developing countries, selling digital products online can be a game-changer. By using crypto-native infrastructure, creators can overcome traditional payment barriers and reach a global audience, increasing their earning potential and contributing to the growth of their local economies. Whether you're in Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya, you can use platforms like Unchained Commerce to launch a successful digital product store and start receiving international payments.
Your Launch Checklist — No Platform Permission Required

Before launching your digital product store, make sure you have a solid foundation in place. Start by setting up your Core Shop Engine, which will provide the backend infrastructure for your store. Next, integrate Web3 Wallet Connect to enable secure and decentralized payments. You should also set up your Admin Dashboard to track orders, transactions, and customer analytics. Finally, test your store thoroughly to ensure that payments are being processed correctly and digital products are being delivered instantly. By following these steps, you can launch a successful digital product store and start receiving international payments with confidence.

With a successful digital product store, you can enjoy the freedom to sell globally, without being locked into expensive subscriptions or contracts, and focus on crafting unique and valuable digital products.
